_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design operational processes that scale with organizational growth, maintaining service quality as data volume, consumer count, and pipeline complexity increase.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-003 (LS, cosine: 0.457), AI-K-017 (AI, cosine: 0.437).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.482). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [concepts, engineering, knowledge, process] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, complexity, consumer, count, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.911, R=0.841). P exceeds R by 0.069 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of process engineering concepts." and "Ability to design operational processes that scale with organizational growth, m" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.474 ≈ STS 0.482 (gap 0.008). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [concepts, engineering, knowledge, process]. WIDAI terms: [ability, complexity, consumer, count, data, design].
